description: Zoho is a business software provider with products including CRM and an MCP service for connecting AI agents to Zoho and third-party applications. The developer materials found on zoho.com here centered on Zoho CRM programmatic access and Zoho's MCP platform.
summary: Zoho.com exposes Zoho CRM developer surfaces including a REST API, a GraphQL API, an MCP offering for CRM, and the ZDK CLI; documented developer auth is Zoho OAuth 2.0 for the APIs, while MCP and CLI login mechanics were not clearly documented in the pages read.
